metadata.title: SYNGO_CC_340
metadata.comment:
Rationale: C1QBP was found tightly associated with docked synaptic vesicles and not with free synaptic vesicles in this proteomic study. It is 1.4-fold enriched in VGLUT1- over VGAT-containing presynapses. In the literature the protein was described as cytoplasmic component, mitochondrial protein and extracellular matrix component.

20/3/2017 Pim
- Because enriched in AZ and not in free SV protein is presumably localized to the AZ, and not in co-purifying SVs.. Experimental description: To isolate docking complexes from rat brain, we first prepared synaptosomes and subjected them to limited proteolysis to dissociate pre- and postsynaptic membranes (Figure 1A). p. 286
